MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Joseph Lee, Esq. (415-398-5000) of Law Offices of Brian L. Larsen. for Plaintiff.
David Florence, Esq. (David.Florence@lewisbrisbois.com) of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP for Defendant.

Plaintiff's Counsel does not stipulate to the matter being heard by the Judge Pro Tem.

JPT stated disclosure re: case he is working on involving party represented by Lewis Brisbois SF office and stated that it does not effect his decision in this case.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT WISMETTAC ASIAN FOODS, INC.'s Motion To Compel Independent Medical Exams:
The matter is continued to August 5, 2021 at 9:30 am in Department 302, Law and Motion Department.
Judge Pro Tem to prepare report and recommendation.
